fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Virginia CNA Certification Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your Certification (2026)
seo.description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Virginia - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: CNA license reciprocity virginia, how to transfer CNA license to virginia, virginia CNA endorsement application

board.name: Virginia Board of Nursing
board.mailing_address:
Virginia Board of Nursing
Perimeter Center
9960 Mayland Drive, Suite 300
Richmond, VA 23233-1463

license_types.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a nursing assistant in Virginia.

steps.title: Create Account and Submit Online Application
steps.description: Go to the DHP Online Licensing System (licenseda.dhp.virginia.gov/apply/), create a new account, and log in. Select and complete either the 'Application for Nursing Assistant Licensure by Examination' or 'Application for Nursing Assistant Licensure by Endorsement', and pay the required application fee.

steps.title: Submit Required Documentation
steps.description: If applying by examination, ensure your Virginia-approved nursing assistant program has submitted verification of completion to the Board. If applying by endorsement, arrange for official transcripts from your training program or verification of current, active licensure in another state to be sent directly to the Virginia Board of Nursing.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Follow the specific instructions provided by the Virginia Board of Nursing after submitting your application to complete the state and federal criminal background check process through the approved vendor.

steps.title: Pass the Nurse Aide Competency Examination (if applicable)
steps.description: If applying by examination, once deemed eligible by the Board, you must register with Credentia (the testing vendor) to schedule and successfully pass both the written/oral and skills components of the Virginia Nurse Aide Competency Examination.

steps.title: License Issuance
steps.description: Upon successful completion of all requirements, including a clear background check and passing the competency exam (if applicable), the Virginia Board of Nursing will issue your Certified Nursing Assistant license.

documents.detail: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.
Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

provisional_text: Some states allow CNAs to work under supervision for a limited period while their endorsement application is being processed.
reciprocity_text: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

faqs.question: Who administers the Virginia CNA exam?
faqs.answer: The VA nurse aide exam is administered by Credentia. Register at credentia.com/test-takers/va.

faqs.question: How do I verify a Virginia CNA?
faqs.answer: Use the DHP License Lookup at dhp.virginiainteractive.org/Lookup/Index or contact VBON at (804) 367-4515 or nurseaide@dhp.virginia.gov.

reciprocity.notes: Virginia CNA endorsement is handled through the Credentia CNA365 platform or the VA Board of Nursing.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become a CNA in VA.

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA to Virginia.

hero.title: Become a CNA in Virginia
hero.dek: To become a Certified Nursing Assistant in Virginia, you must apply online through the DHP Online Licensing System by creating an account and submitting the appropriate application.

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in Virginia
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to Virginia CNA certification.

official_links.registration_steps: To create an account, visit the DHP Online Licensing System, click 'Register for a New Account', and follow the prompts to register using your email address. After successful registration and login, select the appropriate application type (e.g., 'Application for Nursing Assistant Licensure by Examination' or 'Application for Nursing Assistant Licensure by Endorsement') to begin your application.
